examples.title: Read Repair Mechanism
examples.description: Demonstrates how inconsistent replicas are fixed during read operations
examples.code:
PROCEDURE ReadData(key)
    replicas = GetReplicas(key)
    responses = ParallelRead(replicas)
    latest = FindLatestVersion(responses)
    IF NotAllSame(responses)
        ParallelWrite(replicas, latest)
    RETURN latest.value
examples.explanation: When reading data, system checks all replicas and repairs stale copies
